error.signature: org.apache.kafka.common.errors.TimeoutException: Topic my_topic not present in metadata after 60000 ms
error.regex: (Topic.*not present in metadata|TimeoutException.*metadata|topic.*not exist|Unknown topic or partition)

verdict.summary: Producer/consumer cannot find topic. Topic does not exist and auto-creation is disabled, or bootstrap servers are wrong.

dead_ends.why_fails: Auto-creation leads to typo-induced phantom topics. Create topics explicitly in production.

dead_ends.action: Connect directly to a broker instead of using bootstrap servers
dead_ends.why_fails: Direct broker connection bypasses cluster metadata; breaks when broker changes or cluster rebalances

workarounds.action: Create the topic explicitly before producing/consuming
Verify bootstrap servers are correct and reachable
Check topic exists with list command
